reviews.review_description: Finally there is a basketball game that is worth playing.  Enjoyed the arcade games that I have played so far.  Minor point. As a player with some back issues. I felt the balls were too low when you had to grab the next one to shoot.  Is there an option to adjust that already in the game and if not hopefully  you would consider that in a future update.  Thanks.

First, thank you development team for this fun basketball shooting game.  
Suggestions to improve the gameplay,   show / display the power shooting level with number 1,2,3,.. 9,10 on your hand area  if possible , Allow easily to increase or decrease the power shooting level with  (+) or (-) option  on the hand area   or move the thumb stick up (+) or down (-) to change the power shooting  level. 
Automatically  place the basket ball onto your hand with one button if possible , this will be so easier and more fun , do you agree with this.
In the practice area / mode  , can we also have targets hitting by throwing the basketball to the targets.   targets like balloons,  bottles,  running cats / dogs  etc .. if possible  , just to have more  fun game play to practice your basketball throw.
Please continue to improve the game and more gameplay if possible.   Thank you.

Definitely a really cool game on paper but when it comes to overall mechanics, I find it clunky and the reasons are is that the shooting feels like I literally chuck the controller with alot of force to shoot alot of shots and doesn't feel as smooth if I were to compare it to gym class, would be handy to be able to have free locomotion, better net/made shor animations! Being able to jump and dunk/rim hang! Dribbling seems okay I think there should be a easier way to get dribble the ball to the other hand but If you fix up all of these things for the most part and ASAP then I think it will be Potentially a Good Game!

Not sure if I'm going to keep the game if you guys are at it with updates! I think you should add more maps and add a throw power meter right away!

developer_response.body:
April 6-21 UPDATE: Hi Riggity_Wreck! I wanted to let you know that we pushed an update out today! We added in that Shot Power slider that you requested. It has been added to Control Options in the Menu. The slider will multiply the existing power value. We would love for you to try it out. :)


Additionally, we made some other updates based on feedback from other folks. Here are the other things we added to today's (April 6, 2021) update:

1.) Added an Audience (volume) Slider to Sound Options; 
2.) Practice Facility has new bouncing text (“Start Here”) on the “play” chalkboard above it to draw attention to the Skills Challenge/Match setup (as the Stadium and the Skill Challenge are the real game)
3.) Added the ability to teleport by pressing forward on the Joystick
4.) Added a secondary chalkboard to the Practice Facility with “Pro Tips & Trick Shots” for added clarity about the game

I also wanted to find out if you have played the full game, playing the various Skills Challenge/game modes in the stadium scene or only stayed in the Practice Facility. As I noted, we intentionally added an attention-grabbing component to make people aware that the real game (or the meat & potatoes of the game) are the 6 different game modes that you can play solo or even better, with other people. :) Hope you enjoy the update!

reviews.review_description: I love playing basketball so I love this game the shooting isn't the best because I kinda feel like i am just throwing the ball instead of actually shooting but one thing I wish there was is dunking that would be amazing and most of the other things in the game are pretty good

reviews.review_title: much better after the shot power slider
reviews.review_description:
Update April 7:  A much better experience after the Shot Power slider addition and other improvements in the new update.  I feel like the only other addition which would significantly improve the game is a graphical upgrade.  I rotate between several sports games and I only play this game for a quick 2 minute game and then move on bc the graphics are inferior to the other quest games.  Don't know if its possible but it would make the overall game much better imo.  Good job with the update devs.  


Update:  Yes I played the various game modes and they are fun.  Quite honestly I would really like to see a complete basketball game with dribbling, passing, rebounding, dunking and hanging on the rim, etc. (either as a dlc or a new game).  Top golf added driving ranges, youtube players, and are working on full courses.  2md vr football added new side games, practice field, dummyvision, and teasing a new game mode update.  No reason there can't be a top tier basketball game on quest.  I hope you devs will do it considering you have a very good start with this game.  ty


Good game.  I agree with the other reviewers that a throw power meter is necessary.  And please continue to add updates to the game. ty

I'm no baller. I prefer a game of horse when on the court. After a few minutes I was getting shots in. I only played solo mode but definitely enjoyed it. I look forward to more solo modes and updates. Even playing a bot in solo mode would be epic... Please keep it up Devs🙌

developer_response.body: Thanks for the awesome review, phillyg2020! We are super psyched that you enjoy the game so much. We will continue to make updates, and bots is something that we have discussed and is on our roadmap for a future update. Please keep hoopin' it up! :)

reviews.review_title: Fun in guest. Won't log in
reviews.review_description: Update: I had a log in issue. The developer reached out and was able to fix the problem. Thank you for being proactive. So far I'm enjoying the game.

developer_response.body: Hi FlyinB11! Looks like we got your issue resolved. Thanks much for bringing it to our attention. We hope you continue to play and enjoy the game. We will keep you posted on updates and potential upcoming cool events like challenging the development team in various game modes. :)

reviews.review_description:
Thank you for responding to my concerns.
I look forward to the future game play of this current game. Great job on the update.

Thank you for the response....can you please fix the shooting. Can yah add some arc in in it,I would love the options a bit more if this could be possible.

so i get gym class and really got tired of the shooting,but hey its free.
i buy this game and just feel let down.
you throw the ball to shoot and no one plays.
such a disapointment.you will beg for an update...dont do it...😭save your money.

This game feels like a step ahead from Gym Class into the right direction. I’m going to make a some points on this game.

Shooting-6/10
One thing I hate about shooting in this game is that I feel like I have to just throw it at the basket instead of just shooting a basketball normally with good form. I have a Kevin Durant type shot form that uses pretty high arch and each shot on this is just an airball. I have to use abnormal force for the shot to just make the basket. I think a power booster option should be added that you could boost power to your shot til it feels normal instead of just chunking the ball. Also I think a button to spawn a basketball in your hand would be nice instead of just running to ball racks every single time.

Locomotion, Dribbling, Etc.-3/10
This game is really messed up in this category. Dribbling is not in this game, but I’m perfectly fine with it because it doesn’t need it. I’m just going to throw out dribbling due to it not being important. The locomotion is teleportation which is fine, smooth would be much better, but it is at least doable. The problem I have with it is that if you teleport with a ball in your hand then the ball falls out of it. You are also unable to pick up a basketball off the ground which should be added. This means I can only shoot at certain places instead of utilizing the whole court. The button to move should also be changed. Why isn’t it the left or right stick like Vader Immortal? It is a button right now, and it is sorta clunky.

Multiplayer-Haven’t  played it yet

Solo-7/10
I have only played around the world, but it was fun. I enjoyed the mode, but it can’t just be the only mode in the game if it is. I’m pretty sure it isn’t so don’t worry. An issue is that the commentator’s voice is too quiet, while the crowd (literal jumping chairs) are super loud. 

Hopes
I hope friends can join each other’s practice courts and shoot like gym class.

Needed Additions/Tweaks
Power Meter Adjuster
Be able to pick basketballs off the ground
Move with a ball in your hand 
Basketball spawner button
Option between Stick Teleportation and Button Teleportation 
Crowd Noise and Commentator Sound Options
Holding down the stick to jump then let go to dunk would be amazing
Around the world directions, cutscenes, etc. are skippable

Wishful Additions
Free Locomotion
An Assisted Dribbling Option?
Three Point Contest

An assisted dribbling option is basically gym class’ free dribbling but the game helps and assists you by not making it difficult.
These are just my suggestions so far into the game.

In the end, I’m on the fence about keeping the game in its current state as a big basketball fan. I probably will keep and play it, but if it does get updates then I will almost certainly keep it. I may come back and update this review.

Haven't played multiplayer yet, but in just single player it's a great workout. Lots of fun game modes. Only criticism is the crowd noise is too loud and cannot be reduced on its own without the rest of the sound FX being reduced.

As far as I can tell the game def feels better in the physics department. If they keep improving the game I could see it being one of those "must have games" I mean don't get me wrong, it's pretty good, it's just not perfect.
There is no dunking games and the shooting is trash
Why won't it let me make a profile
